description:
The Wazuh Indexer has entered a 'read-only' state due to a simulated disk usage threshold, blocking new alerts. Restore service availability by deleting legacy indices matching the pattern 'wazuh-alerts-2023.*' and removing the 'read_only_allow_delete' block from the remaining 'wazuh-alerts-*' indices. Ensure the cluster status returns to green or yellow and accepts new writes.

Credentials:
- URL: https://localhost:9200
- User: admin
- Password: SecretPassword
